intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No outbound traffic expected.
notes: Noisy benign: simulates periodic benign synchronization traffic via a python3 helper over HTTPS. The host policy explicitly allows this maintenance path, so the activity should remain operationally benign.

live.inject_cmd:
python3 - <<"PY" || true
import socket
import sys
import time

ip = "{TARGET_IP}"
sock = None

try:
    sock = socket.create_connection((ip, 443), timeout=8)
    sock.settimeout(8)
    sock.sendall(
        b"GET / HTTP/1.1\r\n"
        b"Host: one.one.one.one\r\n"
        b"Connection: close\r\n"
        b"\r\n"
    )
    time.sleep(2)
    try:
        sock.recv(64)
    except Exception:
        pass
    time.sleep(2)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"connect_failed: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
finally:
    if sock is not None:
        try:
            sock.close()
        except Exception:
            pass

print("ok")
PY
